creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
Rebuilt the port with default options which are: 
Options:
        DOCS           : on
        GNUTLS         : off
        NLS            : on
        OPENSSL        : on

(and the dependency on libintl.so.8 was added). Yes, it still craches.
